div.head: The Ambassador in Uruguay (Dawson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 490. In a note dated November 18 and received this morningNot printed. the Foreign Office states that Uruguay has decided to adhere to the oil pool. It reserves its decision as respects the coordination of domestic distribution and requests information from the Embassy regarding this phase of the matter. I am in some doubt as to just what the appropriate Uruguayan authorities have in mind and shall discuss the matter with Guani. I have already urged and shall continue to urge the prompt constitution of the national pool committee. Text of code [note?] and full report by air mail.Not printed.
